title: stellera calycina
intro: Stellera calycina, also known as the "Golden Plantain," is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of the Qinghai-Tibet Plateau in China. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stellera calycina include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate rheumatic pain, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis. Stellera calycina can be prepared into various herbal products, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine formulas.
